subject: Fix duplicate declaration errors in client-budget.js
body:
Removed duplicate function declarations that were causing SyntaxError:
- renderUniversalMetrics
- renderComparisonCharts
- renderRaceChart
- renderComparisonTable

These functions were both forward-declared as dependency injection
variables AND exported as local functions, causing JavaScript to
throw 'Identifier has already been declared' errors.

Root cause: During modular refactoring, these functions were moved
from app.js to client-budget.js but forward declarations weren't
cleaned up.

Updated claude.md with bug fix documentation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
